meaning: n.(英国)锡利群岛人 adj.锡利群岛(人)的
examples: The Isles of Scilly Steamship Company runs the Skybus service and the Scillonian ferry.
The Scillonian ferry currently runs for only seven months a year and the other link, Skybus, is weather-dependent.
The Scillonian III has been docked at St Mary's Harbour since its crossing from Penzance on Thursday morning.
